## Tool

Name and category.

## Change

What should be added, changed, or fixed?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The expected behavior is implemented.
- [ ] The tool can be run locally.
- [ ] README or usage notes are updated if needed.

## Notes

Technical details, references, or edge cases.
